plugins.name: maestro-nerve
plugins.description: Production MCP memory layer for AI agents. Provides server_info plus search_workspace, list_entities, inspect, profile, ground, discover, and act.draft. Workspace-scoped, evidence-grounded, read-first, and designed to replace fragmented per-agent memory with one auditable substrate across Claude Code, Codex, ChatGPT, Claude Desktop, and custom MCP clients.
